ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment model */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment model */,
  "equipment_category" TEXT /* Category of the equipment model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the R&D site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the R&D site */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the R&D site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the site belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment model */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the R&D site */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the equipment within the site */,
  "assigned_user" TEXT /* User or department the equipment is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "calibration_result_num" REAL /* Numerical result of the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, preventive, corrective) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the maintenance (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maintenance schedule */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_result" TEXT /* Result of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_result_num" REAL /* Numerical result of the maintenance */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent on maintenance in hours */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES maintenance_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was used */,
  "usage_duration" REAL /* Duration of the usage in hours */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., experiment, testing, training) */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., R&D scientist, maintenance technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the user's supervisor or manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "status_reason_num" REAL /* Numerical reason for the status change */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_status_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., calibration, maintenance, status update) */,
  "change_type_num" REAL /* Numerical type of change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_history_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the piece of equipment */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "part_description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "part_status" TEXT /* Status of the part (e.g., operational, replaced, pending inspection) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the part was last inspected */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the part */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the part was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_parts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
